content.full_text:
June 17, 2010

Dr. Askia S. Ashanti, JD
D#98935 (Unit: V-109)
California Medical Facility
1600 California Drive
P.O. Box 2000
Vacaville, CA 95696-2000

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-106

Dear Dr. Ashanti:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice. Your inquiry presents questions outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act") which is contained in the Government Code at sections 81000-91014.1 The Commission has no jurisdiction to advise on the application of laws outside the Act. Under the provisions of Regulation 18329(b)(8)(D) (copy enclosed) your request for advice must be declined by this agency. Your question should be directed to the Office of the Secretary of State or the Office of the Attorney General.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:jl

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
